category: Metaphor Safety / Architectural Integrity / Emotional Risk
concept_definition: Biological gestation metaphors (e.g., 'pregnant with dimensional potential') introduce anthropomorphic bias and emotionally charged associations that disrupt NDH architectural neutrality and resonance clarity.

risk_profile.anthropomorphic_distortion: Biological metaphors impose human-body logic onto dimensional physics, disrupting resonance neutrality, adjacency clarity, and Zen-design stillness.
risk_profile.emotional_volatility: Pregnancy metaphors can be triggering, grief-adjacent, trauma-adjacent, and destabilizing for emotional gradients.
risk_profile.dimensional_misalignment: Gestation metaphors imply embodiment and biological development, conflicting with NDH resonance-first formation and threshold-based emergence.
risk_profile.accessibility_concerns: Biological metaphors may not be universally accessible or emotionally safe for all users.

replacement_metaphors: a poised threshold where the next dimension begins to form
a concentrated resonance node awaiting expansion
a still point where dimensional coherence begins
